title: Primary Horizontal Logo
description: Main brand logo in horizontal layout with symbol + wordmark. Used in header, footer, and marketing materials.

accessibility.altText: Nexus logo — horizontal layout with purple hexagon symbol

generationPrompt: Professional brand logo lockup. Purple hexagon icon on the left, wordmark 'NEXUS' on the right. Clean white background. Minimalist corporate design. Horizontal layout 4:1 aspect ratio. Vector style, no gradients.
